title: netbox/ipam-resolve input (Workflow-facing)
description: The Workflow-step-facing input Contract for the netbox/ipam-resolve Action (ADR-0113 D4). It is INTENTIONALLY IDENTICAL in shape to the class contract capabilities/ipam.input (ADR-0111) — a co-fidelity test (TestIpamResolveActionContractCoFidelity) binds them so they cannot drift. It exists because a capability-resolve Action invoked as an EXPLICIT Workflow Step is validated by the actions/<name>.input convention, whereas the resolve-inject path validates the same params against the class contract. `pool` and `role` are mutually exclusive (oneOf); no implicit precedence (§2.4).

key.description: The STABLE request identity (e.g. the subnet's name). The provider anchors idempotency on it (a re-resolve returns the same allocation) — ADR-0111 D4/F1.

pool.description: The parent prefix/supernet (or provider pool id) to carve from.

role.description: A named allocation role/purpose the provider maps to a pool.

size.description: The requested prefix length (e.g. 24 for a /24).

region.description: Scope: the region Entity name (ADR-0059) to allocate within.

tenant.description: Scope: the sovereignty/ownership tenant to allocate within.

vlanGroup.description: Scope: the VLAN group to draw a VLAN id from (when a VLAN is requested).
